MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Patrick Lee is present.
Attorney Jack S. Marquez appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Mercedes Cortez and Thomas Cortez are present.
Attorney Thomas Lee representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT . The trial date of Sep-4-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
